steps.assistant_text: 11-insn append-pair (count at 0xC0, 8-byte pairs at 0xC4/0xC8). Sibling of func_00002088 with the identical as1 SCHEDULER TIE cap (documented 81.82% NM, 10+ variants tried, feedback_ido_sw_before_addu_unreachable). The two independent instructions are `addu t1,a0,t0` (entry base addr) and `sw t9,0xC0(a0)` (store incremented count); the delay slot store depends on t1. Collapsing the count-store and the entry-store onto a SINGLE source line frees IDO's as1 scheduler to interleave by data-readiness, hoisting the addu and producing the target's addu-before-sw order. Whitespace-only steer; same-line grouping is load-bearing.

metadata.verification: matching-build wordcmp (reloc-masked): 0 non-reloc text diffs, 11==11 insns, same instruction multiset, reloc-set match; build/.o == expected/.o byte-identical; full make ROM byte-identical (cmp clean)
